in this role you will be the post-sales main point of contact for our largest enterprise customers ($50m for an individual program). please briefly describe your experience managing high-stakes external customer relationships and who you interfaced with directly (e.g. engineerings, sales, executives, etc.).
mapbox builds multiple api and sdk products for our b2b customers. please briefly describe your experience owning programs supporting complex api and/or sdk products.

please briefly describe the most complex and large scope program you were in charge of and the internal matrix organizational structure involved (e.g. direct and indirect reports you managed, number of features requested, program budget size, total number of stakeholders involved, executive stakeholder management, etc.).
please list the language(s) you speak and select your proficiency level for each (limited working, full professional, native/bilingual).

ai.notes: The location field is a combobox that likely requires dynamic input. The resume upload is handled via a file input.
